title: Ordinary Gods
author: Nerdy Fiction
tagline: The universe does not announce itself.
description: On the last night of 2026, at exactly 10:00 PM Eastern, something changed at the level where reality itself is written. Eight billion people felt nothing. A small handful hesitated. This is the story of how five of them found each other — and discovered they were not alone.

characters.name: Robert Calloway
characters.tagline: A struggling actor who learned, in a waiting room, that he could move things without touching them.

characters.name: Alex Whitfield
characters.tagline: A mechanic who can take strength from one person and give it to another.

characters.name: Dr. Kassidy Hale
characters.tagline: A research scientist who noticed an anomaly the moment it arrived, and refused to look away.

characters.name: Sam Mercer
characters.tagline: A jeweler whose hands learned, overnight, to read the shape of metal itself.

characters.name: Farrukh
characters.tagline: A rideshare driver from Ohio who can summon, and befriend, one ant a day.
